mapper.select: select av.id, av.name, av.attr_key_id as attr_key_id, ak.name as attr_key_name, av.is_deleted from attr_value av left join attr_key ak on av.attr_key_id = ak.id and ak.is_deleted = 0 where av.id in (select attr_value_id from room_attr_value where room_id = #{id}) and av.is_deleted = 0
